esotericismProphecy(tag=meme_MadScientist)->Such occult knowledge can only be acquired through experimenting endlessly on new lifeforms, unshackled by any rules or absurd bureaucratic procedures.
serketistProphecy(tag=meme_MadScientist)->[itIsSaid] we will experiment endlessly on new lifeforms, unshackled by any rules or absurd bureaucratic procedures.

intro(tag=meme_MadScientist) ->On the [place_summary] [place_name], the [memberNamePlural] built a genetic engineering lab, and countless genetic wonders were created there, for the glory of [deity0_name].

eschatologismFact(tag=meme_MadScientist)->We will experiment endlessly on new lifeforms, unshackled by any rules or absurd bureaucratic procedures, and the end of times will be ushered by our genetic creations.

introMemo(tag=meme_MadScientist)->Please, PLEASE conduct a proper inventory of your experiments after leaving the lab! A couple Bearofleets scheduled for termination escaped the genetics lab yesterday when they were left unattended and fled into the wild! Do you know what those creatures could do to the ecosystem?
alienistProphecy(tag=meme_MadScientist)->We will create and breed many creatures, experimenting endlessly on new lifeforms, unshackled by any rules or absurd bureaucratic procedures.

conflict(tag=meme_MadScientist) ->A misguided [foeLeader], believing in stablishing a constraining code of conduct for scientific experimentation, wanted to defy [deity0_name]'s will and stop our genetics research.

founderJoin(tag=meme_MadScientist) ->[founderName], a great scientist, showed the hard, cold data to the [foeLeader], and convinced [foeLeader_objective] that constraining our work would only serve for impeding [deity0_name]'s vision.
victory(tag=meme_MadScientist) ->The [foeLeader] came to firmly believe in [deity0_name]'s admonitions.

setup(tag=meme_MadScientist) ->[founderName] was a geneticist in one of the Glitterworlds. [founder_possessive] visionary genetic engineering work was constantly delayed by countless bureaucrats, mumbling moralists and the manipulated public opinion, and one day [founder_pronoun] had enough.
story(uses=1,tag=meme_MadScientist) ->[founderName] gathered [founder_possessive] followers and embarked in a voyage to the Rim, seeking a place where they could do their vital research unimpeded.

lessonIntro(tag=meme_MadScientist) ->The smartest geneticist in our community once taught me the history of genetic engineering, how humanity has been seeding the galaxy for centuries with genetically modified creatures based on old Earth animals. He was leading me to understand that
lesson(tag=meme_MadScientist) ->genetic engineering is the key to our future, and shackling experimentation with rules and absurd bureaucratic procedures is detestable
LanguageData.GR_MadScientists.label: mad scientists
LanguageData.VVE_Nauticals.description: Embracing the vastness of the waters offers a deep connection to life's mysteries.
LanguageData.VVE_Nauticals.descriptionMaker.rules.rul: creation(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[deity0_name] made all of [deity0_possessive] followers look to the endless seas.
episode(uses=1,tag=meme_Nauticals) ->Speaking to the believers, [deity0_name] said: "Only by conquering the seas will you reach true enlightening".
lessonReinforcement(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->We will come upon our enemies from the untamed waters, like swift and divine justice.
archistBasis(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->The Archotechs' pure minds are fluid like water, beings of fickleness and changeability.
archistFact(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->By sailing the seas we pay hommage to their unpredictable and capricious nature.
archistProphecy(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[inTheEnd], only those who transcend the limits of the earth will also be able to transcend their physical bodies.
animistBasis(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->The spirits teach us that the unpredictability of the seas holds the secret to a pure existence.
animistFact(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->Only by sailing the seas can we get closer to the spirits.
animistProphecy(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[itIsSaid] only those who transcend the limits of the earth will also be able to commune with the spiritual world.
intro(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[place_summary] [place_name] was always fraught with conflict. The [memberNamePlural] were besieged constantly by their foes, and this deeply saddened [deity0_name].

conflict(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[deity0_name] witnessed the contant assaults of a terrible [foeLeader], a war leader, and [deity0_pronoun] decided to give sails to [deity0_possessive] followers, so that they could sail the seas to avoid and ambush their enemies.

founderJoin(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[founderName], the greatest among our navigators, was warned of the [foeLeader]'s plan by [deity0_name], and when [foeLeader_pronoun] assaulted them a huge navy of enormous vessels was ready and waiting for [foeLeader_objective].
victory(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->The [foeLeader] was swiftly attacked from the seas, all in [deity0_name]'s name.

setup(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[founderName] was a navigators, the best of [founder_possessive] class. [founder_pronoun] spent decades of [founder_possessive] life sailing in all kinds of vessels, both civilian and military.
story(uses=1,tag=meme_Nauticals) ->[founderName] understood better than anyone else that true freedom lies in sailing the seas, for the waters may be capricious, but they are also fair.
lessonIntro(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->The ancient navigators of Earth were absolutely right. They taught us that
lesson(tag=meme_Nauticals) ->the only true freedom lies in sailing the endless seas
LanguageData.VVE_Nauticals.label: nauticals
LanguageData.VVE_Roadragers.description: For us, the road is sacred, and vehicular dominance is both a belief and a testament to our power. We view the roar of our engines and the rush of asphalt beneath our tires as sacred.
LanguageData.VVE_Roadragers.descriptionMaker.rules.ru: creation(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->[deity0_name] cared only for the roar of the engines. [deity0_pronoun] ordered all the faithful to hit the road.

episode(uses=1,tag=meme_Roadragers) ->Speaking to [deity0_possessive] believers, [deity0_name] said: "I myself will carry you through the gates of Valhalla. You shall ride eternal, shiny and chrome!".
lessonReinforcement(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->I myself will carry you through the gates of Valhalla. You shall ride eternal, shiny and chrome!
archistBasis(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->The Archotechs understand that power is not just a means to an end. Power is an end on itself.
archistFact(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->The Archotechs will stand in awe of the powerful roar of our engines. It is by their hand we will rise from the ashes of this world.
archistProphecy(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->[inTheEnd], they will carry us through the gates of Valhalla. We shall ride eternal, shiny and chrome!
animistBasis(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->The spirits understand that power is not just a means to an end. Power is an end on itself.
animistFact(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->It is by their hand we will rise from the ashes of this world.

animistProphecy(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->[itIsSaid] only those who let the roar of their engines be heard above all else will be carried by the spirits through the gates of Valhalla. They shall ride eternal, shiny and chrome!
intro(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->[place_summary] [place_name] glistened with the fresh engine oil that had dripped from our sacred vehicles, a testament of [deity0_name]'s glory.
conflict(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->A rabid [foeLeader], wanting to get [foeLeader_possessive] hands on our cars, tried to attack with the help of [foeLeader_possessive] many [foeSoldiers].

founderJoin(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->[deity0_name] bestowed our founder, [founderName], with the [relic0_name], and [founder_pronoun] used it to annoint and augment the V8 engine of his custom-made Road Raging car, resisting the onslaught.
victory(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->The massacre was sublime. [founderName] slaughtered countless enemies, and we celebrated by hitting the road mounted on all our vehicles.
setup(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->[founderName] understood that the roar of an engine is the only true measure of power.

story(uses=1,tag=meme_Roadragers) ->[founderName] always repeated the same lesson over and over again: "I myself will carry you through the gates of Valhalla. You shall ride eternal, shiny and chrome!".
lessonIntro(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->It is only by the roar of our engines that one arrives at pleasure. You need to understand that
lesson(tag=meme_Roadragers) ->I am your redeemer. It is by my hand you will rise from the ashes of this world
LanguageData.VVE_Roadragers.label: roadragers
LanguageData.VVE_Skyseekers.description: Elevation, both physical and spiritual, is achieved by soaring through the skies.
LanguageData.VVE_Skyseekers.descriptionMaker.rules.ru: creation(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[deity0_name] made all of [deity0_possessive] followers look to the endless skies.
episode(uses=1,tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->Speaking to the believers, [deity0_name] said: "Only by conquering the skies will you reach true enlightening".
lessonReinforcement(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->We will come upon our enemies from the unreachable skies, like swift and divine justice.
archistBasis(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->Archotechs are pure minds, beings of the sky.
archistFact(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->By soaring the skies we get closer to the Archotechs.
archistProphecy(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[inTheEnd], only those who transcend the limits of the earth will also be able to transcend their physical bodies.
animistBasis(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->The spirits teach us that the endless skies hold the secret to a pure existence.
animistFact(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->Only by soaring the skies can we get closer to the spirits.
animistProphecy(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[itIsSaid] only those who transcend the limits of the earth will also be able to commune with the spiritual world.
intro(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[place_summary] [place_name] was always fraught with conflict. The [memberNamePlural] were besieged constantly by their foes, and this deeply saddened [deity0_name].

conflict(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[deity0_name] witnessed the contant assaults of a terrible [foeLeader], a war leader, and [deity0_pronoun] decided to give winged vessels to [deity0_possessive] followers, so that they could soar the skies above their enemies.

founderJoin(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[founderName], the greatest among our aviators, was warned of the [foeLeader]'s plan by [deity0_name], and when [foeLeader_pronoun] assaulted them a huge squadron of fighters was ready and waiting for [foeLeader_objective].
victory(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->The [foeLeader] was swiftly bombarded from the sky, all in [deity0_name]'s name.

setup(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[founderName] was a pilot, the best of [founder_possessive] class. [founder_pronoun] spent decades of [founder_possessive] life flying all kinds of aircraft, both civilian and military.
story(uses=1,tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->[founderName] understood better than anyone else that true freedom lies in soaring the endless skies, far above any problems.
lessonIntro(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->The ancient aviators of Earth were absolutely right. They taught us that
lesson(tag=meme_Skyseekers) ->the only true freedom lies in soaring the endless skies
LanguageData.VVE_Skyseekers.label: skyseekers
LanguageData.VVE_Travelers.description: The world is vast and meant to be explored in all its facets.
LanguageData.VVE_Travelers.descriptionMaker.rules.rul: creation(tag=meme_Traveler) ->[deity0_name] wrote [deity0_possessive] commandments in eleven plasteel tablets. The fifth commandment read: "I shall not refrain from exploring the world."
episode(uses=1,tag=meme_Traveler) ->In accordance with [deity0_name]'s precepts, we happily traveled abroad, away from our settlements, to see all our world has to offer.
lessonReinforcement(tag=meme_Traveler) ->Only true explorers can never be caught unawares.
archistBasis(tag=meme_Traveler) ->Archotechs are always aware of everything. Being unaware of your surroundings is almost obscene to them.
archistFact(tag=meme_Traveler) ->The archotechs teach us that exploring and travelling are a path to transcendence.
archistProphecy(tag=meme_Traveler) ->[inTheEnd], those who spend their whole lives hiding won't transcend, while those who are infused by wanderlust will join the archotechs.

animistBasis(tag=meme_Traveler) ->Spirits govern everything, from the most abstract concepts to concrete ones. Specifically, each place has its own spirit, and that's why discovering and traveling to all these places brings us closer to the spirits.
animistFact(tag=meme_Traveler) ->The spirit of wanderlust is a powerful one, and instills one with a passion for freedom, for exploration: you never know what the road ahead may bring.
animistProphecy(tag=meme_Traveler) ->[itIsSaid] only those who are able to live without roots and roam free can truly appease the spirits.
intro(tag=meme_Traveler) ->The [memberNamePlural] were restless, for [deity0_name] had commanded them to explore the surrounding lands, and they were tired of roaming around living off the land.
conflict(tag=meme_Traveler) ->One of the elders wanted to defy [deity0_name]'s commandments, and close the settlements for further exploration.

founderJoin(tag=meme_Traveler) ->[founderName], the Great Explorer, grew tired of the insolence of the elder, and usurped his power. From that point on, the [memberNamePlural] would be the most skilled explorers in the land, venturing far away.
victory(tag=meme_Traveler) ->It was thus that we became enamoured with wanderlust, and traveled the whole world exploring even its farther confines.
setup(tag=meme_Traveler) ->[founderName] was a skilled explorer. [founder_pronoun] longed for discovery, travelling to the farther confiens of the world.

story(uses=1,tag=meme_Traveler) ->Seeking the thrill of adventure, [founderName] assembled a small group of [founder_possessive] followers and chartered a ship to travel to the Rim. [founder_possessive] discoveries were the stuff of legend, mapping a plethora of strange new worlds and new civilizations, boldly going where... errr, sorry, got carried away a bit there.
lessonIntro(tag=meme_Traveler) ->Humans fear the unknown, it's a fact. It is abundantly clear that
lesson(tag=meme_Traveler) ->we need to explore our surroundings. Being unaware of what is around us is a recipe for disaster
LanguageData.VVE_Travelers.label: travelers
LanguageData.VQE_Technophobia.description: Humanity should reject technology as it exposes us to discord and cataclysm.
creation(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->[deity0_name] taught humanity to survive through the strength of their hands and the purity of nature, warning that machines would only bring ruin.
episode(uses=1,tag=meme_Technophobic) ->When humanity turned to machines, [deity0_name] wept and unleashed storms to sweep away the taint of their arrogance.
lessonReinforcement(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->I saw it with my own eyes when the great cities fell, powerless in the face of their own hubris.
archistBasis(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->The archotechs turned away from humanity, seeing us as slaves to our machines. Only by abandoning technology can we regain their favor.
archistFact(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->Machines dull the spirit and weaken the mind, driving humanity further from the enlightenment of the archotechs.
archistProphecy(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->[inTheEnd], only those who live pure, machine-free lives will be spared when the archotechs cleanse the world.
animistBasis(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->Every living thing has a spirit, and the soulless machines disrupt the harmony of the natural world.
animistFact(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->The spirits of the earth grow weak where machines tread, their power siphoned and corrupted.
animistProphecy(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->[itIsSaid] that when the last machine falls silent, the spirits will return and heal the world.
eschatologismFact(tag=meme_Technophobic)->Machines are the heralds of the apocalypse, and their creations will poison the earth until nothing is left but ash and ruin.
eschatologismProphecy(tag=meme_Technophobic)->[inTheEnd], the machines will turn against their creators, bringing devastation until only those who shun technology remain.

introMemo(tag=meme_Technophobic)->To: All Staff
From: Office of Sustainability
Subject: Policy Update - Technology Usage

Effective immediately, all non-essential machinery is to be phased out. Remember, our ancestors thrived without these devices, and so can we. Continued reliance on technology undermines our resilience and poses long-term risks to our sustainability goals. Let's lead by example and demonstrate the strength of self-reliance. Compliance will be closely monitored.
intro(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->The [memberNamePlural] gathered in the shadow of [place_name], a place untouched by machines, and pledged themselves to the ways of simplicity and balance.
chthonianProphecy(tag=meme_Technophobic)->[itIsSaid] that the machines are mere tools of the dark forces below, and every gear turned brings us closer to their dominion.
serketistProphecy(tag=meme_Technophobic)->The insects thrive without machines, a lesson in resilience that humanity has forgotten.
alienistProphecy(tag=meme_Technophobic)->It was machines that created these terrifying creatures, and as such we must reject technology as a source of great evil.
conflict(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->A cruel [foeLeader] sought to spread machines into the sacred lands of the [memberNamePlural], sparking a desperate struggle for survival.
founderJoin(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->A [place_job] named [founderName] led the charge against the [foeSoldiers], armed only with tools of the earth and the strength of [founder_possessive] followers.
victory(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->[founderName] rallied the [memberNamePlural] to destroy the factories of the [foeLeader], cleansing the land of machinery and restoring harmony.
setup(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->[founderName] saw the collapse of a society built on machines and vowed to prevent humanity from repeating its mistakes.
story(uses=1,tag=meme_Technophobic) ->[founderName] gathered like-minded individuals, teaching them to reject technology and embrace a self-reliant life in harmony with nature.
lessonIntro(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->The elders taught me a truth that echoed through the ages:
lesson(tag=meme_Technophobic) ->reliance on machines breeds fragility, and only through simplicity can we endure
LanguageData.VQE_Technophobia.label: technophobia
LanguageData.VFEM2_Structure_Norse.description: This ideoligion is a descendant of Germanic paganism, also known as Asatru. It may have very different precepts than those of thousands of years ago, but its symbols are similar.
LanguageData.VFEM2_Structure_Norse.label: norse
